columns.extraction_plan: The 'Outcomes' section on page 4 lists the primary and secondary outcomes of the trials, including overall survival, prostate cancer-specific survival, failure-free survival, progression-free survival, metastatic progression-free survival, symptomatic skeletal-related events, toxic effects and adverse events, and cost-effectiveness. A 'Quality of Life Scale' or any related quality of life assessment is not mentioned as an outcome or a measured variable in this section or elsewhere in the provided text.
